title: Beyond Creativity
description: A Vanilla-ish expansion pack for your world. Expand your Horizons!
body:
# Welcome to Beyond Creativity!
#### This is a small (I guess) modpack developed by a single 17 years old and a few of their friends who were very passionate about this little project

#### There is still unfinished content that I would like to add, but what is here sure is enough for a truly fun and fresh Minecraft experience

- #### Altough fully playable on Singleplayer, it is reccomended that you play it with friends on a Multiplayer server
## 
### A brief overview:

- ### This modpack has A LOT of content that was thought of in 4 types: Immersion, Creativity, Quality of Life and Replayability, such as
- Immersion-Type:
  - Simple Voice Chat
  - Voice Chat Interaction
  - Sound Physics remastered
  - LambDynamicLights

- Creativity-Type:
  - Create
  - Twigs
  - Additional Additions
  - Wondrous Wilds

- QoL-Type
  - Roughly Enough Items
  - InvMove
  - ItemSwapper
  - Mouse Tweaks

- Replayability-Type
  - Enderscape
  - Incendium
  - Origins
  - Illager Expansion
##
### A huge thanks to these developers and their respective mods. Without them, this little project of mine wouldn't even be a thing:

- #### The Create Team's
  - [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)

- #### [Stardust Labs':](https://modrinth.com/user/Stardust)
  - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
  - [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)
  - [Continents](https://modrinth.com/mod/continents)

- #### [YUNGNICKYOUNG's:](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG)
  - [Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments)
  - [Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts)
  - [Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons)
  - [Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds)
  - [Better Witch Huts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts)
  - [Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-bridges)
  - [Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples)
  - [Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-extras)
  - [API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api)

- [doctor4t's (Curseforge links)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/doctor4t/projects)
  - [Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective)
  - [Impaled](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/impaled)
  - [Pick Your Poison](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pick-your-poison)
